panels.description: The time between Mempool receiving the transaction and time to be committed.

targets.expr: avg(rate(aptos_core_mempool_txn_commit_latency_sum{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", stage="commit_accepted"}[$interval]) / rate(aptos_core_mempool_txn_commit_latency_count{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", stage="commit_accepted"}[$interval]))

max(rate(aptos_core_mempool_txn_commit_latency_sum{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", stage="commit_accepted"}[$interval]) / rate(aptos_core_mempool_txn_commit_latency_count{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", stage="commit_accepted"}[$interval]))

quantile(0.5, rate(aptos_core_mempool_txn_commit_latency_sum{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", stage="commit_accepted"}[$interval]) / rate(aptos_core_mempool_txn_commit_latency_count{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", stage="commit_accepted"}[$interval]))

quantile(0.9, rate(aptos_core_mempool_txn_commit_latency_sum{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", stage="commit_accepted"}[$interval]) / rate(aptos_core_mempool_txn_commit_latency_count{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", stage="commit_accepted"}[$interval]))

quantile(0.1, rate(aptos_core_mempool_txn_commit_latency_sum{environment=~"$environment", cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", stage="commit_accepted"}[$interval]) / rate(aptos_core_mempool_txn_commit_latency_count{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", stage="commit_accepted"}[$interval]))
